text: Standing here in this modern, brightly lit hallway, I sense both anticipation and curiosity as I approach the exhibition space. Through the glass, the reflection of myself and others seems to echo my thoughts—how much we are observed and interpreted by each other in the act of simply being here. Entering the exhibition, I am confronted by words about exposure and misunderstanding, stirring a resonance within me. The environment, with its vivid colors and thoughtful displays, invites introspection and even a touch of vulnerability. I feel both eager to engage and acutely aware of my presence, as if each moment is an experiment in how I am seen, felt, and understood.
